calendar.matters:
NAME CHANGE CALENDAR
Off Calendar Nov-24-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: his cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Name Change.
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos/Meredith Grier, Proceedings not reported.
Petitioner Kathleen Jean Rottach present in court.
Proof of Publication on file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and the petition should be granted.
The court grants the petition for Change of Name to Kathleen Jean Gross.
Decree Changing Name signed.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Sep-04-2015 Reset To Nov-24-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514 For Order To Show Cause
